feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: DTW template for Forecast screen in MRP Module in SAP Business One
entry.content: I am attempting to upload the 2024 forecast using DTW for the Forecast screen under MRP Modules in MRP. However, I am encountering an issue while using DTW: I am unable to upload for the months of January to December, as they are all denoted to the Quantity field. I am looking for a way to enter the amount allocated to the Quantity field for the months of June to December; I can't do it in a single field. Can anyone offer assistance with this issue? Thank you.

entry.title: ESD (Cash Discount) Process for Greece Localization Specific
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I would greatly value your assistance in comprehending the handling of Cash Discounts in SAP B1 for the Greece localization. It is evident that SAP's behavior in Greece differs from that in our other landscapes. For instance, let's compare two SAP databases: UK and GR:

Take into account an AP Invoice with a net amount of EUR 100, a VAT of 20%, and a 3% Cash Discount if payment is made at least 30 days before the due date.

In the UK Loc. we get:

AccountDebitCredit
Supplier 120
Input VAT20 
Expense100 

UK Payment 

AccountDebitCreditComments
Bank 116.40 
Input VAT 0.60VAT Adjustment (20 - 3%)
Cash Discount Account 3.00 
Supplier120  

Whereas in GR:

AccountDebitCreditComments
Supplier 119.4 
Input VAT19.4 Base Amount reduced by 3%
Expense100  

GR Payment:

AccountDebitCredit
Bank 116.4
Cash Discount Account 3.00
Supplier119.4 

To summarize, the UK invoice is recorded as standard, and the cash discount plus VAT adjustment are only posted upon payment of the invoice. This is logical since we cannot apply a discount at the time of invoicing without knowing if the invoice will be paid within the discount period.

Conversely, in Greece, SAP applies the discount directly on the invoice by reducing the VAT base amount by 3%, effectively making an advance VAT adjustment. This approach seems incorrect as no discount should be calculated at this stage. Although the VAT amount appears accurate if paid within the discount period, reconciling the rest of the process could be challenging.

We have not found any settings in SAP to alter this behaviour, nor is there any SAP documentation that explains this procedure in Greece. It appears we may be overlooking some steps, so any guidance on the correct handling of this would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance,

G.

entry.title: Need to access add button in system message popup when opening Incoming Payment through code.
entry.content: I need to add the incoming payment but unable to access add button in  system popup message in c# code. Is there is a way to get the access to that pop up system message or we can restrict the pop up from opening.

entry.title: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content:
I have 3 invoices for a MC BP. 100 USD . 1000 EURO and 1000 GBP. if the customer wants to pay these invoices in a Local Currency. EGY . how can I do it from the incoming payment document. can the system relize the exchange rate differences. how about the Total Amount Due (****) .. will the system use a total mount or amount due based on the (local currency and exchange rate) from these 3 document. there is something got me here I can't get it . 

from the payment means .. what will be the document amount .. and how is gonna be distribute among the open docs ..

entry.title: how to make line of business mandatory in incoming payment if that row is selected.
entry.content:
Dear Expert

How to make LINE OF BUSINESS mandatory in incoming payment if row is selected. 

please help .

entry.title: SAP B1 10 why items weight and size are mandatory?
entry.content:
On SAP B1 9.x we could create an item and not fill the weight and size.
With SAP B1 10, it looks like it is mandatory.

It is not convenient, so am I missing a configuration specification that would allow us to create an item with empty size and weight? or is it really mandatory?

entry.title: In Inventory Audit report and Inventory Aging report Values are not Matching
entry.content:
Dear Team,
 
We are checking SAP standard report, Inventory Audit report and Inventory Aging report.
 
Both the reports should match Quantity-wise and Value wise.
 
In our case, it matches with Quantity but the value is not matching.
 
We have checked the following SAP Notes.
 
3221488 - The Cumulative Value in the Inventory Audit Report Is Not Equal to the Total Value in the Inventory Aging Report.
3050253 - Inventory Aging Report Displays Wrong Value
2852781 - Incorrect Value in Inventory Aging Report
3335660 - Inventory Aging Report Does Not Consider Inventory Revaluation
1891471 - Inventory aging report displays incorrect value
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: SAP Crypto DLL filling disk space
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have recently upgraded to SAP B1 FP2405. 

Now we find that a certain directory is being filled every 30secs with a DLL file from SAP. It's chewed up 150GB+ in a few days. 

What could be causing this?

entry.title: Why my User Defined Field does not refresh when other field changes
entry.content:
Hi Experts i create a UDF and a Query which compute number of days between two date using DATEDIFF and i want to show it to UDF Field, i setup it using FMS when AR Invoice due date field is change it will automatically compute to the UDF field the total Difference of my Posting Date and Due Date, but apparently it does not refresh at all. here is a sample of my code.

DATEDIFF(DAY,U_CounterDate,T0.DocDate + 10 ) FROM OINV T0 WHERE T0.[DocNum] = $[OINV.DocNum]

entry.title: SAP Business One .The connection to SQL Server failed. Check the log for details.
entry.content:
I first setup SAP Bussiness One(B11000_2405-70004131). The connection to SQL Server failed. Check the log for details. Note: I am not using "sa" user, I use another user that was created on SQL server, whose role is the same as "sa" user.

I have verified: 
Port and firewall , ODBC is OK, TCP/IP is enabled under SQL Native Client Configuration, the SQL Server Browser service is running on the SQL Server.Please help to  fixed it .

entry.title: SAP-VAT CODE-PURCHASE REQUEST
entry.content:
Hi all,

I use SAP- B1

I prepar Purchase Request and I fill ITEM field, SUPPLIER field but VAT CODE field doesn't update in automatic with the SUPPLIER

So we need to check everytime the correct VAT CODE for each item insert in Purchase Request

How can we solve it?

entry.title: General error;339 invalid number: not a valid number string 'tabela' - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Olá, estou com um problema atípico. 

Criei uma UDT, UDFs nessa UDT e depois registrei UDO disponibilizando no menu para uso. 

Porém, não estou conseguindo fazer nenhum registro pois aparece o erro:

[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB DLL][HDBODBC] General error;339 invalid number: not a valid number string 'TABELA'

Já revisei todos os campos, todos estão como Alfanuméricos com tamanho suficiente para a informação que está sendo colocada. Inclusive já apaguei a tabela e registrei outra com outro nome.

Alguém já passou pelo erro consegue auxiliar?

entry.title: SAP BUSINESS ONE, HELP ME @_@
entry.content:
I HAVE SOME QUESTIONS WHILE USING THE PROGRAM,

SO I'M LOOKING FOR ADVICE.

 

1. HOW TO FIXED COLUMN

IS THERE A WAY TO FIX THE COLUMN ON THE SCREEN? 

IF THERE ARE MANY COLUMNS IN THE ROW, 

I WANT TO FIX THE REQURED VALUES AND SEE THE VALUES.

FOR EXAMPLE, I WOULD LIKE TO FIX THE ITEM IN A/R INVOICE.

 

2. HOW TO SEARCH BY ACCOUNT SUBJECT NAME

WHEN REGISTERING FOR AN ACCOUNT SUBJECT IN THE JOURNAL, 

IT CAN BE ENTERED IMMEDIATELY BY ENTERING IT INTO THE ACCOUNT CODE,

AND EVEN IF YOU ENTER IT WITH THE ACCOUNT NAME,

IS THERE A WAY TO ENTER IT ON THE SCREEN?

 

3. IS IT POSSIBLE TO COPY DRAG WITHIN THE SCREEN?

I WONDER IF I CAN COPY AND PASTE DIRECTLY FROM THE SCREEN INSTEAD OF COPYING IT

TO EXCEL AND PASTING IT ON THE SCREEN.

 

I APPRECIATE A LOT OF HELP FOR BEGINNERS.

THANKS

entry.title: Hide Inactive Banks
entry.content:
Hello,

How do we hide inactive bank accounts from the dropdown list in document printing window and the Business partner master data under the payment system?

Regards,

Maria

entry.title: SAP B1 SDK and B1 Studio Installation
entry.content:
Hello,

i have a question regarding the SAP B1 SDK and SAP B1 Studio installation.

We are running SAP B1 on a windows server in a seperate VM.
I want to start learning how to develope for SAP B1 to expand on its functioality.
Do i need to install the SDK and Studio Suite inside the VM where the SAP Server is running?
Or can i install it on my local machine for development purposes?

If both ways are viable, which one is the preferable one?
If installing it locally is possible, would i need to install a separate server on my local machine, or is the client installation enough for that purpose?

entry.title: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content:
Hello!

I know that SAP has discontinued the B1DE tool for creating add-ons in the .ARD extension. Additionally, I'm aware that SAP also recommends that add-ons be registered as LW (Light Weight), but my question is: Is it still possible to generate add-ons in .ARD extension nowadays?

I believe it was only possible through the B1DE tool, right? Now that it's no longer available, can we still generate the .ARD installer?

Thanks!

entry.title: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availability for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Referring to the file below, I'm in the middle of preparing for setting up a HA environment now.
File name : Setting_Up_SAP_HANA_Database_High_Availability_for_SAP_Business_One_10.0_for_Automatic_Failover.pdf

Please refer to the image below.

Wondering if it is possible to install SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 as central server OS instead of SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application.

FYI, to give you more clarity on versions, here is the list of 4 types which can exist based on the above.
(1) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application
(2) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2
(3) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 for SAP Application
(4) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4

Looking forward to your reply.
Thanks in advance. 🙂

Bests,
Wonuk Jeon

entry.title: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi All

Is this Query limitation cannot have DocEntry hyper link to drill into posted transactions in this customized Query?

 

SELECT

T8.DocEntry, T8.DocNum,
T2.DocNum,
T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP], T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price

 

--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum

FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T8.[DocDate] <=[%1]
ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi All

I managed to write this FMS Query to auto Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0] and able to search Item Number after typing BT Catalogue UDF but once I TAB to next field BT Catalogue UDF value disappeared.  Please advise is there any step I missed out or is this a FMS limitation search on Item Master Data UDF in Sales Quotation?

 

Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0]

 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: User management in Add on empty of content
entry.content:
After migrating from FP2208 to FP2405 we are having problems with the native SAP Add Ons. EFM, Outlook Integration and Payment.


The fact is that when accessing user management to specify their behavior per user, the user list is empty...

how can it be?

Nobody from SAP?
No forum moderator?

SAP Business One Extensibility SAP Business One
